title: PDAC-p1
characteristics_ch1_all: tissue: PDAC | age: 78.9 | Sex: Female | treatment: No treatment
extract_protocol_ch1: Samples were flash frozen in liquid nitrogen, cryo-sectioned and H&E stained. After sectioning onto the Visium slides, sample processing was performed as described in the Visium 10x Genomics protocol for fresh-frozen tissue samples (15 minutes were used for permealization time).
extract_protocol_ch1_2: Library preparation was performed as described in  the Visium Spatial Gene Expression Reagent Kit (PN-1000189), Library Construction Kit (PN-1000196), and Dual Index Plate TT Set A (PN-3000431) as described in the Visium protocol for fresh frozen tissue samples (CG000239).
data_processing: The demultiplexed reads were processed using Space Ranger (v.1.3.1) from 10x Genomics, aligned to the GRCh38 reference genome with default parameters. The resulting unique molecular identifier (UMI) count matrices were then analysed using Seurat (v.4.3) 47 in the R platform (v.4.2.0). Detailed quality control (QC) metrics were generated and evaluated, and spots were carefully filtered to obtain high-quality SRT data for downstream analyses. Briefly, for basic quality filtering, spots with low complexity libraries (UMI count below 100) were filtered out to eliminate low-quality spots. Additionally, spots located within acellular stromal interfaces were excluded and samples with more than 40% low-quality spots were also excluded from subsequent analyses.
data_processing_2: Assembly: GRCh38 reference genome
data_processing_3: Supplementary files format and content: spatial.tar.gz : Compressed tar archives include processed output from Space Ranger with spatial information
data_processing_4: Supplementary files format and content: filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 : Filtered feature-barcode matrices in HDF5 format
data_processing_5: Library strategy: Spatial Transcriptomics
contact_institute: New York University Grossman School of Medicine

title: Sample_1
characteristics_ch1_all: tissue: Pancreas | tissue/specimen type: Primary Tumor (PT)
extract_protocol_ch1: Visium spatial gene expression data for FFPE tissue were obtained following the protocols CG000408, CG000409, and CG000407 provided by 10X Genomics for tissue preparation and library construction. The tissues were then deparaffinized, stained, and decrosslinked.
extract_protocol_ch1_2: Human whole transcriptome probe panels were added to the deparaffinized, stained, and decrosslinked tissues. After hybridization, the probes were ligated, and the ligation products were released from the tissue upon RNase treatment and permeabilization. The ligated probe products were captured by spatially barcoded oligonucleotides, and the probes were extended. Libraries were generated from the extended probes. The quantity and quality of each resulting library were assessed with a Qubit and Agilent TapeStation. The final libraries were sequenced on Illumina NovaSeq 6000 28-bp reads, including spatial barcode and UMI sequences, and 50-bp probe reads were generated
data_processing: *library strategy: Spatial Transcriptomics
data_processing_2: Raw sequencing data were processed using 10X genomics Space Ranger pipeline to generate FASTQ files
data_processing_3: Sequences were aligned to human reference genome (GRCh38) using Space Ranger's default settings
data_processing_4: Gene expression level of RefSeq genes were quantified using Space Ranger's default settings
data_processing_5: Assembly: GRCh38
data_processing_6: Supplementary files format and content: aligned_fiducials.jpg : aligned fiducials of the tissue image
data_processing_7: Supplementary files format and content: detected_tissue_image.jpg : image of tissue and spots
data_processing_8: Supplementary files format and content: scalefactors_json.json : scalefactors in json format
data_processing_9: Supplementary files format and content: spatial_enrichment.csv : file in CSV format that contains table of Moran's I values for each feature when specific conditions are met

The quantity and quality of each resulting library were assessed with a Qubit and Agilent TapeStation. The final libraries were sequenced on Illumina NovaSeq 6000 28-bp reads, including spatial barcode and UMI sequences, and 50-bp probe reads were generated

extract_protocol_ch1: Visium spatial gene expression data for FFPE tissue were obtained following the protocols CG000408, CG000409, and CG000407 provided by 10X Genomics for tissue preparation and library construction. The tissues were then deparaffinized, stained, and decrosslinked.
extract_protocol_ch1_2: Human whole transcriptome probe panels were added to the deparaffinized, stained, and decrosslinked tissues. After hybridization, the probes were ligated, and the ligation products were released from the tissue upon RNase treatment and permeabilization. The ligated probe products were captured by spatially barcoded oligonucleotides, and the probes were extended. Libraries were generated from the extended probes. The quantity and quality of each resulting library were assessed with a Qubit and Agilent TapeStation. The final libraries were sequenced on Illumina NovaSeq 6000 28-bp reads, including spatial barcode and UMI sequences, and 50-bp probe reads were generated
data_processing: *library strategy: Spatial Transcriptomics
data_processing_2: Raw sequencing data were processed using 10X genomics Space Ranger pipeline to generate FASTQ files
data_processing_3: Sequences were aligned to human reference genome (GRCh38) using Space Ranger's default settings
data_processing_4: Gene expression level of RefSeq genes were quantified using Space Ranger's default settings
data_processing_5: Assembly: GRCh38
data_processing_6: Supplementary files format and content: aligned_fiducials.jpg : aligned fiducials of the tissue image
data_processing_7: Supplementary files format and content: detected_tissue_image.jpg : image of tissue and spots
data_processing_8: Supplementary files format and content: scalefactors_json.json : scalefactors in json format
data_processing_9: Supplementary files format and content: spatial_enrichment.csv : file in CSV format that contains table of Moran's I values for each feature when specific conditions are met
contact_address: Melvin and Bren Simon Comprehensive Cancer Center, Indiana University School of Medicine
data_processing_10: Supplementary files format and content: tissue_hires_image.png: high-res image of tissue
data_processing_11: Supplementary files format and content: tissue_lowres_image.png : low-res image of tissue
data_processing_12: Supplementary files format and content: tissue_positions.csv : list of spatial barcodes and the co-ordinates specfying spots
